sourceMovie.title: Blockers
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Blockers for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Kay Cannon keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Lady Bird
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Blockers clicked for you, Lady Bird (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Blockers?
faq.answer: Try Lady Bird, American Pie, Easy A—each shares DNA with Blockers while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Blockers?
faq.answer: Blockers (2018) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Blockers worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
